ecf7b51 perf(core): scale PNG via ImageIO kCGImageDestinationImageMaxPixelSize
c551c12 feat(core): wire ScreenCaptureKit path via libsckit.dylib for Codex-style capture

alternative_path_kept_as_fallback.used_when: libsckit.dylib unavailable or SCK capture fails

perf_pass.librarian_research: bg_da87538b — confirmed SCK requires .dylib shim (Node koffi cannot construct ObjC blocks), CGWindowListCreateImage broken on macOS 26+
perf_pass.empirical_finding: On macOS 26.3 arm64, SCK is ~15ms slower per call than CGDisplayCreateImage for one-shot PNG screenshots. The 16-33ms Codex parity number was unreachable via either path on this platform; SCK chosen for architectural parity, not peak latency.
